name: goal_constraint_fact
notes: Basic factual retrieval should beat raw overlap and recover both explicit claims plus the compressed state.
source:
raw raw:1:
  source "fixture://goal"
  text "We need durable memory without losing meaning."
span span:1:
  raw raw:1
  start 0
  end 46
claim clm:goal:
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate goal
  object durable_memory
  evidence span:1
claim clm:constraint:
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate constraint
  object preserve_meaning
  evidence span:1
state sta:design:
  target ent:project:seam
  field goal durable_memory
  field constraint preserve_meaning
  evidence span:1

name: translator_workflow_intent
notes: Workflow-style normalized query should recover the translator claim and state.
source:
raw raw:1:
  source "fixture://translator"
  text "We need a translator back into natural language for memory workflows."
span span:1:
  raw raw:1
  start 0
  end 66
claim clm:translator:
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate translator
  object nl_ir_pack_roundtrip
  evidence span:1
state sta:translator:
  target ent:project:seam
  field translator nl_ir_pack_roundtrip
  evidence span:1

name: relation_trace_graph
notes: Relation-heavy query should recover both graph edges plus the connected translator claim, while pack scoring still preserves traceable evidence and refs.
source:
raw raw:1:
  source "fixture://relation"
  text "Search should expand shorthand before ranking and keep traceable packs."
span span:1:
  raw raw:1
  start 0
  end 71
claim clm:translator:
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate translator
  object nl_ir_pack_roundtrip
  evidence span:1
rel rel:trace:
  src pack:context:translator
  predicate depends_on
  dst clm:translator
  evidence span:1
rel rel:search:
  src flow:search:1
  predicate expands_symbols_before_rank
  dst pack:context:translator
  evidence span:1

name: temporal_current_runtime
notes: The current runtime should outrank the superseded runtime and keep the stale answer out of top-1.
source:
raw raw:1:
  source "fixture://temporal"
  text "In 2024 retrieval used chunk cache. In 2026 retrieval uses graph memory runtime."
span span:1:
  raw raw:1
  start 0
  end 80
claim clm:runtime:v1:
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate runtime
  object chunk_cache
  status superseded
  t0 "2024-01-01T00:00:00+00:00"
  evidence span:1
claim clm:runtime:v2:
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate runtime
  object graph_memory_runtime
  t0 "2026-01-01T00:00:00+00:00"
  evidence span:1
state sta:runtime:2026:
  target ent:project:seam
  t0 "2026-01-01T00:00:00+00:00"
  field runtime graph_memory_runtime
  evidence span:1
rel rel:supersedes:
  src clm:runtime:v2
  predicate supersedes
  dst clm:runtime:v1

name: contradiction_resolution
notes: The asserted provenance-aware claim should outrank the contradicted raw-only claim.
source:
raw raw:1:
  source "fixture://contradiction"
  text "Raw chunks only are not enough. Memory needs MIRL with provenance."
span span:1:
  raw raw:1
  start 0
  end 66
claim clm:truth:v1:
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate memory_truth
  object raw_chunks_only
  status contradicted
  evidence span:1
claim clm:truth:v2:
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate memory_truth
  object mirl_with_provenance
  evidence span:1
state sta:truth:
  target ent:project:seam
  field memory_truth mirl_with_provenance
  evidence span:1
rel rel:contradicts:
  src clm:truth:v2
  predicate contradicts
  dst clm:truth:v1

name: scope_thread_priority
notes: Thread-scoped retrieval should prefer the thread memory over the project default.
source:
raw raw:1:
  source "fixture://scope"
  scope project
  text "Project memory defaults to long_horizon_mode, but this thread uses thread_memory_mode."
span span:1:
  raw raw:1
  scope project
  start 0
  end 83
claim clm:project:goal:
  scope project
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate goal
  object long_horizon_mode
  evidence span:1
claim clm:thread:goal:
  scope thread
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate goal
  object thread_memory_mode
  evidence span:1
state sta:thread:
  scope thread
  target ent:project:seam
  field goal thread_memory_mode
  evidence span:1

name: namespace_symbol_inheritance
notes: Parent-namespace symbols should expand in a child namespace and retrieve the underlying memory records.
source:
entity project "SEAM" as ent:project:seam
symbol sym:mem:
  namespace org
  symbol mem
  expansion memory
symbol sym:xlat:
  namespace org
  symbol xlat
  expansion translator
claim clm:ns:goal:
  namespace org.app.user.thread
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate goal
  object durable_memory
claim clm:ns:translator:
  namespace org.app.user.thread
  subject ent:project:seam
  predicate translator
  object nl_ir_pack_roundtrip
state sta:ns:
  namespace org.app.user.thread
  target ent:project:seam
  field memory durable_memory
  field translator nl_ir_pack_roundtrip
